creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
Created attachment 209543
Sharfile for graphics/kqtquickcharts

Adding a new port for kqtquickcharts.

There used to be a version of this port for KDE 4, but this was removed due to EOL of KDE 4.

This module is runtime dependency for ktouch (misc/ktouch). So, without this port, ktouch crashes at startup.

The follow-up patch would be to add the dependency to ktouch, but the port should probably be there first.
